search_query:
index=main sourcetype=_json _index_earliest=-1m
| rex field=_raw "(?<uri_path>[^\s]+)"
| where match(uri_path, "(\.\./|\.\.%2[Ff]|/etc/passwd|/etc/shadow|/windows/win\.ini)")
  AND NOT match(uri_path, "(\.log$|/var/log/|/.env$|/audit/)")
| eval rule="A01", sev="High"
| table _time, src_ip, uri_path, rule, sev
